ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "birth_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of birth */,
  "death_datetime" TEXT /* Date and time of death (if applicable) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "insurance_id" TEXT /* Insurance ID of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maternity_births" (
  "birth_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maternity birth */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient who gave birth */,
  "baby_first_feed_date" TEXT /* Date of the baby's first feed */,
  "date_of_pregnancy_outcome_current_fetus" TEXT /* Date of the current fetus's pregnancy outcome */,
  "birth_weight" REAL /* Birth weight of the baby */,
  "gestational_age" INTEGER /* Gestational age at birth */,
  "delivery_method" TEXT /* Method of delivery */,
  "complications" TEXT /* Any complications during birth */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("birth_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maternity_births_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maternity_care_plans" (
  "care_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each care plan */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient who is the subject of the care plan */,
  "maternity_careplan_date" TEXT /* Date when the care plan was established */,
  "care_plan_details" TEXT /* Detailed notes about the care plan */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Follow-up appointment date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("care_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maternity_care_plans_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinics" (
  "clinic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clinic */,
  "clinic_name" TEXT /* Name of the clinic or hospital */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the clinic or hospital */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the clinic */,
  "clinic_type" TEXT /* Type of clinic */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the clinic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clinic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the doctor */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the doctor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the doctor */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* Medical license number of the doctor */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the doctor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient visit */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient who visited */,
  "clinic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the clinic or hospital visited */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the doctor who treated the patient */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis made during the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_clinic_id FOREIGN KEY ("clinic_id") REFERENCES clinics ("clinic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was created */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the medical issue or condition */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Details of the treatment or intervention */,
  "record_version" INTEGER /* Version of the patient record */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_records_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of medication administration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of medication prescription */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of medication prescription */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the medication */,
  "side_effects" TEXT /* Potential side effects of the medication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient receiving the treatment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the treatment or intervention */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "treatment_type" TEXT /* Type of treatment */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lab_tests" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory test */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the patient who underwent the test */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was conducted */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the test */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of lab test */,
  "reference_range" TEXT /* Normal reference range for test results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id")
)
